name: open-video-catcher
description: CocoCut-like WebExtension for detecting and downloading accessible page media.

scripts.lint: node --check background/core.js && node --check background/service-worker.js && node --check content/content-core.js && node --check content/content-script.js && node --check page/page-hook.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check src/media-utils.js && node --check scripts/generate-update-manifest.js && node --check scripts/package-extension.js && node --check scripts/validate-manifest.js && node --check scripts/verify-release.js && node --check tests/browser-smoke.js
scripts.build: npm run validate:manifest && npm run lint && npm test && node scripts/package-extension.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run lint:webext && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
